name: Real Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the dry ingredients and stir together.
2. Add milk, mix well until combined.
3. Add eggs, beat thoroughly to incorporate air.
4. Stir in oil, beat again until well blended.
5. Melt Crisco in a heated cast iron skillet (9 inches across).
6. Pour the batter into the hot pan.
7. Bake in a 400°F oven for about 40 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
